economic_notes: Lil'wat Nation is located in Pemberton Valley BC with over 2,000 members. Investments in business enterprises including Lil'wat Holdings LP, Spel'kumtn Community Forest LP, multiple numbered BC companies. BC First Nations Gaming Revenue Sharing. Whistler Blackcomb MDA revenues. FNFA loan taken to finance forestry license purchase. Baxter Creek Developments and BC Hydro settlement funds internally restricted.
notes: Nation has a separate set of consolidated financial statements also prepared for the same year. Investments in business enterprises are accounted for on modified equity basis - 11 entities included in reporting entity. FNFA promissory note of ~$8M taken out during the year to finance forestry license purchase on behalf of related party Lil'wat Forestry Ventures LP - significant jump in long term debt. Segmented payroll total ($12,138,306) differs from expenses by object wages line ($11,873,975) likely due to segment transfer allocations. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + CMHC + DFO + FNESC + FNHA + BC Gaming + Province of BC. Population stated as 'over 2,000 members'. No remuneration schedule included in this document.
